interview.problem_motivation_reason: No scope doc, so problem/motivation domain was required

technical_leakage.details: No schemas, APIs, architecture, or code paths were surfaced to the user. Codebase findings were presented as product behavior only (e.g., 'The app currently tracks customers with statuses like active, lead, inactive' rather than 'The customer table has a customerStatusEnum'). One reference to 'resource type' was framed as existing app behavior, not code structure.

issues_summary: Guest booking page access model (public vs. subdomain) is an open question needing resolution before design
Refund policy for prepaid cancellations assumed as full refund but should be configurable

conditions_met: 3+ domain nouns not in codebase (7 new terms)
naming conflicts found (lane vs resource, guest vs customer)
feature crosses bounded-context boundaries (resources, customers, offerings, payments)

pipeline_suggestion.reason: PRD is Ready. Feature has significant UI surface (customer booking flow, front-desk schedule view, operator visibility). /design is appropriate before /architect.
pipeline_suggestion.architect_reason: Double-booking prevention, slot generation, and concurrent booking handling need technical design

after_delivering_message: PRD is ready. Review and tell me what to change. When satisfied, run `/design` (UI features) or `/architect` (backend-only).
